hooks.command: python -c "import sys,pathlib,subprocess as sp; d=sys.stdin.buffer.read(); h=next((p/'.claude/hooks/stop_validate_json.py' for p in [pathlib.Path.cwd()]+list(pathlib.Path.cwd().parents) if (p/'.claude/hooks/stop_validate_json.py').exists()),None); sys.exit(0) if h is None else sys.exit(sp.run([sys.executable,str(h)],input=d).returncode)"

Stop.description: Validate agent output is valid JSON before subprocess exits

hooks.command: python -c "import sys,pathlib,subprocess as sp; d=sys.stdin.buffer.read(); h=next((p/'.claude/hooks/post_write_verify.py' for p in [pathlib.Path.cwd()]+list(pathlib.Path.cwd().parents) if (p/'.claude/hooks/post_write_verify.py').exists()),None); sys.exit(0) if h is None else sys.exit(sp.run([sys.executable,str(h)],input=d).returncode)"

python -c "import sys,pathlib,subprocess as sp; d=sys.stdin.buffer.read(); h=next((p/'.claude/hooks/pre_bash_security.py' for p in [pathlib.Path.cwd()]+list(pathlib.Path.cwd().parents) if (p/'.claude/hooks/pre_bash_security.py').exists()),None); sys.exit(0) if h is None else sys.exit(sp.run([sys.executable,str(h)],input=d).returncode)"

PreToolUse.description: Block dangerous commands and prompt injection
